global_preferences.summary: Prefer GLM 5.2 as a sensible fallback for text, coding, long-context, and analysis when no cheaper, specialized, or project-specific model is clearly better.
global_preferences.source: User instruction in Codex session on 2026-06-20

notes.summary: Local NumberQuest testing found GPT-5 Image produced better game image results than FLUX.2 Pro. Prefer it for final image assets when quality matters, but compare current OpenRouter pricing before use.
notes.source: User observation in Codex session on 2026-06-20
